_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Meeting Agenda
summary: The Meeting Agenda provides information concerning the purpose, location, and schedule of meetings and conferences for managing systems equipment, related items, and services.
use_relationship:
The Meeting Agenda provides information concerning the purpose, location, and schedule of meetings and conferences required to manage systems equipment, related items, and services. For the purposes of this DID, a conference is considered to be a type of meeting.
a. This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format, content, and intended use information for the data deliverable resulting from the work task described in the solicitation.
b. This DID relates to DI-ADMN-81250, Meeting Minutes. (Copies of this document are available online at https://quicksearch.dla.mil.)
c. This DID supersedes DI-ADMN-81249B.

distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: Contractor format, compatible with government applications, is acceptable.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The meeting agenda shall include the following, where applicable:

children.title: The purpose and objective of the meeting.
The meeting location (or virtual conferencing application, if applicable), meeting date, and meeting duration.
A daily chronological listing of each major topic and subtopic to be discussed and the amount of time to be devoted to each topic.
A list of activities to be accomplished during the meeting and identification of the corresponding office of primary responsibility (OPR) for each activity.
A list of subcommittees to be established during the meeting and the proposed goals, objectives, and activities for each subcommittee.
Meeting location(s), meeting schedule(s), and purpose or subject area to be covered by each subcommittee.
Names of the meeting chairperson, co-chair, and subcommittee chairpersons.
Reference to, and a brief description of, the results of relevant previous meetings, to include action items.
A brief description of progress on action items or problems identified at previous meetings.
Information on billeting, messing, transportation, and administrative services available to meeting attendees.
A complete list of documentation to be available for attendee review.
Other pertinent information, such as: forms to be used, identification of any deviations or waivers, security classification level, and security clearance requirements.

preparation_instructions.title: Distribution Statement.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable Distribution Statement, as necessary, in accordance with Department of Defense Instruction (DoDI) 5230.24, Distribution Statements on Technical Documents, Enclosure 4. (Copies of this document are available online at www.esd.whs.mil/DD.)

preparation_instructions.title: Classification Marking.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable classification marking, as necessary, in accordance with Department of Defense Manual (DoDM) 5200.01, Volume 2, DoD Information Security Program: Marking of Information, or Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI) markings (when applicable) in accordance with DoDI 5200.48, Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI). (Copies of these documents are available online at www.esd.whs.mil/DD.)
